message:
test(mcp-client): add error, config, tool definition, and content item tests

Add 10 tests for mcp_client types:

- McpClientError: display format, with_hint builder, serialization
  with/without hint (skip_serializing_if)
- ExternalServerConfig: serde roundtrip with all fields
- McpClientToolDefinition: is_destructive() without annotations
  defaults to false, serde roundtrip
- McpClientContentItem: as_text() for text, non-text, and missing
  type field

Total mcp_client tests: 20 (was 10).

Build: --no-default-features --features mcp-client
All 20 pass (0.05s).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
